description_en: Create a traditional Chinese square table with a flat top and apron under the top. The table should have four legs, each with a slight curve at the base to fit the apron. The style should reflect a Ming or Qing dynasty aesthetic.

components.name: top_board
components.description: The flat top of the table

components.name: apron
components.description: The apron under the top board

style_notes: Table should have a simple, elegant design typical of Ming or Qing dynasty furniture. Legs should be slightly curved at the base to fit the apron. Joinery should be mortise and tenon with dowels. Proportions should follow traditional Chinese furniture design, with leg height approximately 0.55–0.65 of the total height.
